title: PALM / STORM (single-molecule localization microscopy)
source_data_quality_note: Source MD is widefield-fluorescence template (fan-out artifact). Physics below is grounded in canonical domain literature for this specific principle.

E.description: PALM / STORM (single-molecule localization microscopy): single molecule localization produces the measurement through a 4-node primitive DAG K.psf.airy -> D.threshold.isolated -> L.gaussian_fit -> int.temporal, with time-integrated exposure and photon-shot-noise-limited (Poisson counting). Recovery is posed as a non-convex inverse problem that inverts the forward operator to estimate the scene-side point list. Difficulty tier delta=10 with effective condition number kappa_eff~30; calibration-level mismatch (drift_nm_per_frame, multi_emitter_overlap, background_bias) sets the accuracy floor at the Omega boundary. See the forward_model field for the closed-form imaging equation.
E.forward_model: y_t(r) = sum_i 1_{active_i,t} * PSF(r - r_i) * A_i + n; recover {r_i} over T frames
E.world_state_x: Scene parameter of interest (density / complex field / lifetime / normals depending on spec).
E.observation_y: Measured intensity or photon counts from the imaging system.

W.regime: Existence of the recovered point list is guaranteed within the declared Omega bounds. Uniqueness is local rather than global (non-convex landscape); convergence depends on initialisation and priors. Stability is moderately conditioned (kappa_eff ~= 30); drift_nm_per_frame dominates the stability cliff; multi_emitter_overlap and the remaining mismatch parameters contribute higher-order bias terms. Photon-shot-noise-limited (poisson counting) sets the irreducible data-fidelity floor, while TV / wavelet-sparsity / deep priors stabilise recovery at the ill-conditioned end of Omega.

C.solver_class: linear-operator + convex optimisation [ThunderSTORM] | linear-operator + deep neural prior [DECODE, DeepSTORM]
C.error_bound: Data-fidelity bound: ||x_hat - x||_2 <= C1 * sqrt(sigma_signal^2) / sqrt(photon_count). Mismatch-induced bias adds + C2 * |drift_nm_per_frame| + C3 * ||x - x_s||_1 (best s-sparse / low-rank approximation residual). Iterative solvers achieve q=2 convergence (O(1/k^2)) near the MLE; epsilon_fn captures the monotone quality degradation across declared Omega.
C.complexity: O(H * W * log(...)) per iteration; learned variants: O(H W Z * F_theta_cost) per forward pass
